analysis.consistency: The feature is consistent with typical D&D 5e feature leveling and mechanical structure. It provides a benefit during a specific rest type (short rest) tied to a class resource expenditure (Hit Dice).
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is clear, concise, and mechanically sound. It clearly defines the trigger (spending Hit Dice during a short rest), the effect (extra healing), and the progression.

mechanics.trigger: Friendly creatures regaining HP by spending Hit Dice during a short rest.
mechanics.effect: Those creatures regain additional hit points.
mechanics.notes: This feature is a significant boost to the efficacy of short rests for the Bard's party, directly augmenting the standard Hit Dice recovery mechanic.
